rationale: Educ. Code §33.051 defines 'child,' 'minor,' and 'missing child' for a subchapter. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: "Child" and "minor" have the meanings assigned by Section 101.003, Family Code.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption change and this definitions provision.
